text: This is a course that would be helpful to complete programming novices . Any prior knowledge of programming is likely to render it useless to the student . That being said , a programming newbie should have no problem following it . The professor speaks slower than necessary . 1 . 75x or 2x speeds make the pace more manageable and is still easy to follow . In addition , it uses an old version of Python , which tends to make the exercises slightly annoying .
